titleStmt.title: SII 22.272: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 272. (A.R. No. 272 of 1906) NORTH ARCOT DISTRICT, WALAJAPET TALUK, TIRUMĀLPURAM. MANIKAṆṬHĒŚVARA TEMPLE—ON THE SAME WALL. VIKRAMA-CHŌḶA—7th YEAR (A.D. 1124-25)

summary.p: The inscription begins with introduction Pūmādu puṇara etc. It records a sale of 6000 kuḻi out of their common land to the temple of Tirumārpēṟuḍaiyār, by the Ūrār of Śiṟṟiyāṟṟūr a dēvadāna village in Maṇaviṟkōṭṭam, for 20 kāśu received by them inclusive of tax-amount (on behalf of the temple) from Uttamaśōḻaṉ Ponnambalakkūttaṉ alias Kaṇṇagadaraiyar of Kīḻmāndūr in Purakkiḷiyūr-nāḍu, a division of Pāṇḍikulāśani-vaḷanāḍu in Śōḻamaṇḍalam. Half of this land is said to be in favour of the gods Uttama-Chōḷīśvaramuḍaiyār and Avimuttīśvaramuḍaiyār in the temple. The land was to be utilised partly as arecanut garden and flower garden and partly as wet land for cultivation to meet the requirements of worship in the temple. It was let on lease by the temple to one Taḻuvakkuḻaiñja-Pichchar of the Tiruvēgambamuḍaiyār temple (at Kāñchīpuram ?). The donor Kaṇṇagadaraiyar is stated to have made a further gift of about 138 kaḻañju of gold for ornaments to the god (in the main shrine) and silver etc. for some articles of worship.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . pūmātu puṇarap puvimātu vaḷara nāmātu viḷaṅka jayamātu virumpa tan nirupatamalar maṉṉavar cūṭa
yil maṇimuṭi cūṭic ceṅkol ceṉṟu ticaitoṟum vaḷarppa veṅkali niṅki meyyaṟan taḻaippa kaliṅkamiriya
laṅkoḷāḻi varaiyāḻi tiriya Irucuṭaraḷavu morukuṭai niḻaṟṟa virasiṅṅā saṉattu mukkokkiḻānaṭikaḷoṭum viṟ
kecarivanmarāna tiripuvaṉac cakkaravarttikaḷ śrīvikkiramacoḻatevarkku yāṇṭu Eḻāvatu Āṉimāsattu piṟpaka
ṟṟa cataiyattu nāḷ jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattu tirumāṟpeṟuṭaiyār tevatāṉam maṇaliṟkoṭṭattup pura
ṭṭu kuṭiniṅkāt tevatāṉañ ciṟṟiyāṟṟūr Ūrkkuccamaintu ciṟṟiyāṟṟū ruṭaiyāṉ Araiyaṉ Eṟiñ
coṭiyum veḷāṉ cūriyatevaṉum Arayaṉ perāyiramuṭaiyāṉum Uḷḷiṭ ṭom nilavilaiyāvaṇa
kkaiyeḻuttu Āḷuṭaiyār tirumāṟpeṟuṭaiyārkkum Ikkoyil Uttama coḷiśvaramu
ṭaiyārkkum Avimuttiśvara muṭaiyāṟkkum tiruppaṭi māṟṟuḷḷiṭṭaṉat tukku Uṭa
lāka kamukutirunan=tavaṉañ ceykaikkum tiruppaḷḷittāma nan=tavaṉañ cey
kaikkum viḷainilattukkum can=tirātittavarai vilaiporuḷukku miṟaip poruḷukkum
Ikkoyilil Āticaṇṭeśvara śrīpātattu coḻamaṇṭalattu pāṇṭikulā caṉivaḷanāṭṭu pu
ṟakkiḷiyūr nāṭṭuk kiḻmāntūruṭaiyān Uttamacoḻaṉ poṉṉampalakkūtta nāṉa kaṇ
ṇakatarayar Oṭukkiṉa Aṉṟāṭu naṟkācu Irupatu Ikkācu Irupatum Emmi licain=ta vilaipporuḷu miṟaipporuḷu mā
ka Ivvāticaṇṭeśvararpakkal Āvaṇakkaḷiye kaiccelavaṟak koṇṭu Ivvāticaṇṭeśvarar
kku nāṅkaḷ viṟṟukkuṭutta Ūrppotunilattukku tenpāṟkellai palli veṭṭārkālukku va
ṭakkum melpāṟkellai māṭakkoyil Ettattukkuk kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟ kellai kaṭalāṭik
kum ciṟṟiyāṟṟūr Irupatiṉāyirava ṉila nilattukkut teṟkkum kiḻpāṟ kellai ciṟṟiyāṟṟūr nilattukku
m Innilattil kaliṅkattarayaṉ kuḷattukku meṟkkum Ināṟpāṟkellaik (k)ku naṭuvupaṭṭa viḷainilamum ko
llai nilamum patināṟcāṇkolāl mikutikkuṟaivuḷḷaṭaṅkak kuḻi Āṟāyiram Ikkuḻi (ikkuḻi) Āṟāyirattil nilaṅka
lan=tavāṟṟāl Uṭaiyār tirumāṟpeṟuṭaiyārkkuc compātiyum Ik koyil Uttamacoḷiśvaramuṭaiyā
rkkum Avimuttiśvaramuṭaiyārkkuc compātiyumāka Ivvāticaṇṭe śvararkku viṟṟukkuṭuttom
Innilattukku Erinirum Āṟṟukkālum nirkkin=tapaṭi nirpāccikkoḷḷap peṟuvatākavum Innilattil me
nokkiya maramuṅ kiṇokkiya kiṇaṟu makappaṭa Ikkuḻi Āṟāyiramum Ippaṭi Iṟaiyiliyāka Ivvāticaṇṭeśvaratevarkku viṟṟu
vilaiyāvaṇañ ceytu kuṭuttom ciṟṟiyāṟṟūrom Ivarkaḷ veṇṭa Eḻutinen koyiṟkaṇakku veḷāṉ malaikiṉiyaniṉṟāṉ
Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai ciṟṟūruṭaiyāṉ Arayaṉ Eṟiñcoṭi Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku ciṟṟiyāṟṟūruṭaiyān veḷāṉ cūriyate
van Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai ciṟṟi Āṟṟuṭaiyān Arayaṉ perāyiramuṭai yān Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai ciṟṟiyāṟṟuṭaiyān
veḷān Olokanātan Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Aṟiven paṭṭālamuṭaiyā nn=tirunākiśvaran ciṟuvarainakkan Eḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟiven kāmuḻāṉ ka
ṇṇan Aḻiyāttiṟal Eḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟiven veṇpākkiḻān tirumuli Ampalakkūttan Eḻuttu In=ta Āticaṇṭeśvaradevar pak
kal peṟṟu Uṭaiyā tiruvekampamuṭaiyār koyilil taḻuvakkuḻain=ta piccar Ivar vaṟkattārume can=tirātittavarai In=ta kamuku tirunan=tavaṉañ ceyvār kaḷākavu
m In=ta tirunantavaṉattil viḷainilam In=ta tirunan=tavāṉa kuṭikaḷuk koṟṟu Āvatākavum Āḷuṭaiyār tirumāṟpeṟuṭaiyārkku In=ta kiḻ mānntūruṭai
yāṉ Arayaṉ poṉṉampalak kūttanāṉa kaṇṇakatarayaṉ pala tiruvāpara ṇattukku palamāṟṟāl Iṭṭa poṉ nūṟṟumuppatteḻu kaḻañce mu
kkāle Orumā parikalamuṅ kāḷamum veḷḷi nānūṟṟaṟupatin kaḻañcu Aṭṭaṇai Oṉṟuṅ kākkāliraṇṭālum In=ta taḷai nūṟṟeṇpattu muppala
muṅka kamuḻiyum mukavaiyāl ceppu muppattirupalavarai palavaruvāl veṇkalam nūṟṟirupattirupalam nāṟcāṇarai niḷattu tarāviḷa
kku muṉṟuṅ kaṟikkāl caṅkukkalai tarā muppattaimpalam Itu māheśvara rakṣai ..
Digital edition of SII 22.272 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
